description: 极简幽默，复杂概念秒懂。简笔画风格，适合极客受众。
base_style_prompt: XKCD-style whiteboard sketch. Simple stick figures and basic shapes. Rough hand-drawn lines, no perfection. Minimalist backgrounds. Focused on concept clarity over aesthetics. Humorous and accessible. Like ideas drawn on a whiteboard during a technical discussion.
